scope.target: Phase 1 RED coverage for project-bootstrap expanded user-help UX

findings.summary: Executable Markdown support-detail coverage still does not assert the `missing_current_user_language_hint` fallback reason. The plan requires generated Markdown support details to include selected language and fallback reason when one exists. The smoke covers this fallback only in JSON for the `auto` plus empty current-language case, while the only Markdown fallback assertion covers `unsupported_requested_language`.

checks_reviewed.evidence: Diff reviewed read-only; changed RED files match requested scope.
.evidence/wm/project-bootstrap/20260613-expanded-user-help-ux-red.md:18 records Exit 1 expected RED at missing user_summary.language.*; rerun evidence after fixes is recorded at lines 100-108.
.evidence/wm/project-bootstrap/20260613-expanded-user-help-ux-red.md:32 records Exit 1 expected RED for missing docs/generator terms; rerun evidence after fixes is recorded at lines 100-108.
Reviewed paths are project-bootstrap runtime eval/validator/plan evidence only; no React Native UI files changed. AGENTS.md:40 and AGENTS.md:48 mobile UI rules remain out of scope.
Reviewed paths do not touch apps/api, apps/mobile API calls, or packages/contracts. AGENTS.md:84 defines packages/contracts API SoT, but this RED coverage change has no API surface.
Plan scopes this request to Phase 1 RED coverage before implementation. Full gates are scheduled for Phase 4 at docs/plans/active/20260613-project-bootstrap-expanded-user-help-ux-plan.md:361.

residual_risks: The full smoke script was not executed by this read-only reviewer because it writes temporary fixtures; review relied on recorded RED evidence plus static syntax checks.
Validator term checks can still be satisfied by marker strings, so Phase 2 implementation review must verify real generated behavior and sample outputs, not only term presence.
